title: Google AI data centre Vizag: CM Naidu kickstarts $15 billion push to build AI and cloud hub
description: Google AI data centre Vizag: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu inaugurated the Google Cloud India AI Hub in Visakhapatnam. This marks a major development in digital and artificial intelligence infrastructure for the state. The project, part of a larger data centre initiative, signifies substantial foreign investment.

title: Andhra CM Chandrababu Naidu lays foundation for $15 billion Google AI data centre near Vizag
description: Andhra Pradesh chief minister N Chandrababu Naidu has inaugurated the foundation for a $15 billion Google Artificial Intelligence data centre near Visakhapatnam. This 1 GW facility, set to be one of India's largest AI data centres, will significantly boost the state's digital infrastructure and data hub ambitions.
content:

title: Florida's redistricting fight puts Ron DeSantis back in the Republican spotlight
description: Ron DeSantis is back in the national spotlight as he pushes for a new congressional map in Florida. His proposal aims to give Republicans four more seats, equivalent to the expected Democratic gains in Virginia. With his second term ending, this is a key moment for DeSantis to show he could still be a future national leader for his party. However, some Republicans worry the plan might backfire and help Democrats. DeSantis also wants to increase artificial intelligence regulations and loosen vaccine requirements, which have faced resistance. As he navigates this week's special session, his relationship with President Donald Trump and other Republican leaders will be on the line.
content:
TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Ron DeSantis was once the future of the Republican Party, a battle-tested conservative twice elected as governor of Florida. Then Donald Trump steamrolled him on his way back to the White House.
Now, more than two years after... [450 chars]

title: Philippines’ premier AI summit opens in Manila on April 29
description: WHEN the doors open at the Manila Marriott Hotel tomorrow morning, the Philippines will host its most significant gathering of artificial intelligence leaders to date. The second Annual GEN AI Summit Philippines — curated and organized by CollabConf — brings together over 250 C-suite executives, policymakers, technologists and entrepreneurs across two intensive days of keynotes, fireside chats and panel discussions on the future of generative AI.

title: Cadence lifts annual revenue forecast on sustained AI chip
description: Cadence Design Systems anticipates strong revenue growth. The company expects higher earnings for fiscal 2026. This optimism stems from increased investment in specialized artificial intelligence processors. Demand for Cadence's chip design tools is surging. This is driven by complex system-on-chip and AI accelerator designs.
